atten2.ptxt: Be sure to read "PRECAUTION" thoroughly before servicing (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL (for Manual Seat)

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)
REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the seat track cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Operate the power seat switch knob and move the seat to the position farthest forward.
Using a screwdriver, detach the 4 claws and remove the seat track cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the inner seat track bracket cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the 4 claws and remove the inner seat track bracket cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.
Remove the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.
Remove the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket.
Move the front seat assembly to the center position and adjust the seatback to the vertical position by operating the slide and reclining adjuster release handle.
Disconnect the connectors and clamp.
Remove the front seat assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Operate the power seat switch knob and move the seat to the rearmost position.
Remove the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket.
Operate the power seat switch knob and move the seat to the position farthest forward.
Remove the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket.
Disconnect the cable from the negative (-) battery terminal.

atten2.ptxt: Wait at least 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable from the negative (-) battery terminal to prevent the airbag and seat belt pretensioner from deploying (See page ).

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connectors under the seat. Then remove the front seat assembly.
Disconnect the connector from the occupant classification ECU.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the claw and remove the occupant classification ECU.
